amlQuestionnaire.description:
If entity operates licensable activities (e.g. licensed financial institutions), AML Questionnaire is required.

If inputs tend to be vague or do not clearly explain sufficient AML policies in adherence to international/Singapore regulations, we will need to clarify.

File link(Valid URL), accepts png/jpg/jpeg/pdf.

Regex: `/^(https?:\/\/)?(([0-9]{1,3}(\.[0-9]{1,3}){3,5})|(([-\p{L}0-9]{1,256}\.)+[-\p{L}]{2,6}))(:[0-9]+)?([\/?].*)?$/i`

sanctionQuestionnaire.description:
If entity operates in sanctioned countries, we would require % revenue generation to understand the exposure to the sanctioned countries. If below 10%, it will be acceptable.

File link(Valid URL), accepts png/jpg/jpeg/pdf.

Regex: `/^(https?:\/\/)?(([0-9]{1,3}(\.[0-9]{1,3}){3,5})|(([-\p{L}0-9]{1,256}\.)+[-\p{L}]{2,6}))(:[0-9]+)?([\/?].*)?$/i`

operatingLicense.description:

Regex: `/^(https?:\/\/)?(([0-9]{1,3}(\.[0-9]{1,3}){3,5})|(([-\p{L}0-9]{1,256}\.)+[-\p{L}]{2,6}))(:[0-9]+)?([\/?].*)?$/i`

routing_code.description:

account_holder_name.description:

Regex: `/^\s*.{1,191}\s*$/`

fileName.description:

Note: This value will override the default Remittance Information (MT103 Field 70 / pacs.008) in the final payment message sent to the bank when provided.

proxyType.description:
Type of PayNow proxy

- Individual: Accepts `mobile_number`, `nric`, `vpa`
- Business: Accepts `uen`, `vpa`

proxyValue.description:
Acceptable value:
1. proxyType = `mobile_number`
- Format: Start with '+65' followed by 8 characters starting with 8 or 9
- Example: +6581234567

2. proxyType = `nric`
- Format: Should consist of 9 characters, accepting both NRIC and FIN Numbers.
- Example: S1234567A

3. proxyType = `uen`
- Alphanumeric characters with a minimum of 9 characters and a maximum of 13 characters.
- Example: 201411660R

4. proxyType = `vpa`
- Format: [Mobile number or UEN number]#[Unique payment identifier (UPI)]
- UPI is a unique identifier for institutions participating in PayNow.
- Example for mobile number VPA format: +6581234567#GRAB
- Example for UEN VPA format: UEN201411660R#FAZZ

Note: The proxyType field specifies the type of proxy identifier to be used in PayNow transactions. Ensure that the values provided match the specified formats and guidelines for each 'proxyType' option.

idempotencyId.description:
Unique reference number provided by you to prevent double transaction, this cannot be repeated(Must be within 191 characters)
Regex: `/^\s*.{1,191}\s*$/`

amount.description:
Transaction amount (Must be a positive float up to 2 d.p.). For SGD withdrawals, the maximum amount is 200k which is the FAST network limit.
Regex: `/^(?!0(\.0+)?$)([1-9]\d*(\.\d+)?|0\.\d*[1-9]\d*)$/`

description.description:
Description of this transaction (contract) according to merchant.

The following character sets are the only acceptable ones:
- Lowercase letters: **a-z**
- Uppercase letters: **A-Z**
- Numerals: **0-9 **
- Special characters: **/ - ? : ( ) . , ' +**
- Space character

externalReference.description:
External transaction reference which will be seen by the recipient.
Regex: `/^\s*.{1,150}\s*$/`

purposeCode.description:
Regex: `/^[A-Za-z0-9]{1,6}$/`

Note: Applicable to SGD payouts (via FAST network) and payments to UAE. Defaults to `OTHR` if omitted. Full list of supported purpose codes can be found [here](https://docs.straitsx.com/docs/purpose-code-for-fast-payouts).

chargeOption.description:
Charge Option (`SHA` or `OUR`)
Only applicable for withdrawals via SWIFT.

SHA (Shared Charges): You pay our fees; the beneficiary pays the agent/intermediary bank charges.
OUR (All Charges Paid by Sender): You cover all fees, including agent/intermediary bank charges, so the beneficiary receives the full amount.

Note: Please check with your commercial team to confirm the agreed pricing for both SHA and OUR before deciding which option to use.

parameters.description:
Customer Profile ID is retrieved from the response id of Create Customer Profile API
Regex: `/^\s*.{1,191}\s*$/`

bank_account_id.description: Bank Account ID is retrieved from the response of Get a list of customer profile bank accounts API

amount.description:
Transaction amount (Positive up to 2 d.p.). For SGD withdrawals, the maximum amount is 200k which is the FAST network limit.
Regex: `/^([0-9]*[.])?[0-9]+$/`

idempotency_id.description:
Unique reference number provided by you to prevent double transaction, this cannot be repeated.
Regex: `/^\s*.{1,191}\s*$/`

description.description:
Description of this transaction (contract) according to merchant.

The following character sets are the only acceptable ones:
- Lowercase letters: **a-z**
- Uppercase letters: **A-Z**
- Numerals: **0-9 **
- Special characters: **/ - ? : ( ) . , ' +**
- Space character

external_reference.description:
External transaction reference which will be seen by the recipient.
Regex: `/^\s*.{1,150}\s*$/`

charge_option.description:
Charge Option (`SHA` or `OUR`)
Only applicable for withdrawals via SWIFT.

SHA (Shared Charges): You pay our fees; the beneficiary pays the agent/intermediary bank charges.
OUR (All Charges Paid by Sender): You cover all fees, including agent/intermediary bank charges, so the beneficiary receives the full amount.

Note: Please check with your commercial team to confirm the agreed pricing for both SHA and OUR before deciding which option to use.

purpose_code.description:
Regex: `/^[A-Za-z0-9]{1,6}$/`

Note: Applicable to SGD payouts (via FAST network) and payments to UAE. Defaults to `OTHR` if omitted. Full list of supported purpose codes can be found [here](https://docs.straitsx.com/docs/purpose-code-for-fast-payouts).

disbursement_method.description:
Accepts `swift` or `meps` or `bank_transfer`

Note:
  • `bank_transfer`: Supported only for SGD payouts via the FAST network. This is the default value for SGD.
  • `meps`: Available for SGD only.
  • `swift`: Available for both SGD and USD. This is the default value for USD.

Charge Option (`SHA` or `OUR`)
Only applicable for withdrawals via SWIFT.

SHA (Shared Charges): You pay our fees; the beneficiary pays the agent/intermediary bank charges.
OUR (All Charges Paid by Sender): You cover all fees, including agent/intermediary bank charges, so the beneficiary receives the full amount.

Note: Please check with your commercial team to confirm the agreed pricing for both SHA and OUR before deciding which option to use.

proxyType.description:
Type of PayNow proxy

- Individual: Accepts `mobile_number`, `nric`, `vpa`
- Business: Accepts `uen`, `vpa`

proxyValue.description:
Acceptable value:
1. proxyType = `mobile_number`
- Format: Start with '+65' followed by 8 characters starting with 8 or 9
- Example: +6581234567

2. proxyType = `nric`
- Format: Should consist of 9 characters, accepting both NRIC and FIN Numbers.
- Example: S1234567A

3. proxyType = `uen`
- Alphanumeric characters with a minimum of 9 characters and a maximum of 13 characters.
- Example: 201411660R

4. proxyType = `vpa`
- Format: [Mobile number or UEN number]#[Unique payment identifier (UPI)]
- UPI is a unique identifier for institutions participating in PayNow.
- Example for mobile number VPA format: +6581234567#GRAB
- Example for UEN VPA format: UEN201411660R#FAZZ

Note: The proxyType field specifies the type of proxy identifier to be used in PayNow transactions. Ensure that the values provided match the specified formats and guidelines for each 'proxyType' option.

paymentReason.description:
Payment reason is a field used to pass clear, specific instructions to the receiving bank.

recipientCountry.description: Accepts alpha-2 country code e.g. `SG`

proxyValue.description:
Acceptable value:
1. proxyType = `mobile_number`
- Format: Start with '+65' followed by a minimum of 8 characters and a maximum of 16 characters.
- Example: +6512345678

2. proxyType = `nric`
- Format: Should consist of 9 characters, accepting both NRIC and FIN Numbers.
- Example: S1234567A

3. proxyType = `uen`
- Alphanumeric characters with a minimum of 9 characters and a maximum of 13 characters.
- Example: 201411660R

4. proxyType = `vpa`
- Format: [Mobile number or UEN number]#[Unique payment identifier (UPI)]
- UPI is a unique identifier for institutions participating in PayNow.
- Example for mobile number VPA format: +6512345678#GRAB
- Example for UEN VPA format: UEN201411660R#FAZZ

Note: The proxyType field specifies the type of proxy identifier to be used in PayNow transactions. Ensure that the values provided match the specified formats and guidelines for each 'proxyType' option.

parameters.description: Retrieve the unique swap transaction ID from the response of [Execute a swap quote](ref:execute-a-swap-quote) endpoint.

status.description: Status of the swap transaction. Accepts only `completed` or `failed`

idempotencyId.description: Idempotency ID of this swap transaction.

swapPair.description: The currency pair involved in the swap.

sourceCurrency.description: The source currency of requested swap quote.

targetCurrency.description: The target currency of requested swap quote.

fixedSide.description: Indicates which side of the swap has a fixed amount, can be either `source` or `target`.

totalSourceCurrencyAmount.description: The total amount of the source currency that will be deducted for the swap, including any applicable fees.

sourceCurrencyAmount.description: The amount of the source currency being converted, excluding any fees.

targetCurrencyAmount.description: The amount of the target currency that will be received from the swap.

rate.description:
The proposed exchange rate.

Note: The rate is always defined as the first currency in the swap pair quoted against the second currency.

expiresAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the quoted rate expires.

amount.description: The amount of the fee charged for the swap, expressed in the specified fee currency.

currency.description: The currency for the fee amount.

fees.description: Additional transaction fees or markup applied on top of the exchange rate.

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the quoted rate is created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the quoted rate is updated.
